$comment: Machine-readable suppression list for the cross-impl differential harness (generate/DifferentialDriver.java). Each entry marks an INTENTIONAL divergence from the Lightbend reference implementation — an extra-spec E-item, normally also documented as an expected/hocon/.../*.divergence.md. The driver downgrades a listed corpus case from DIVERGE_FROM_LIGHTBEND to SUPPRESSED so only NEW divergences surface as action items. Before adding an entry, triage the divergence per the lightbend-as-spec-interpretation-authority rule: align the impl to Lightbend (treat as a bug) unless Lightbend's behaviour is itself indefensible under any reasonable reading of the spec.
